General.Name: Amoeba SA
General.Description: Amoéba S.A. develops biological products and services for the treatment of microbiological risk in the sectors of water, health, and plant protection in France. The company has developed technology to treat water, surfaces, and chronic wounds that uses the natural biocidal capacity of the living amoeba Willaertia magna C2c Maky; and agriculture biocontrol technology for the treatment of phytopathogenic microorganisms using the lysed. Amoéba S.A. was incorporated in 2010 and is based in Chassieu, France.
General.Address: 38 Avenue des FrEres Montgolfier, Chassieu, France, 69680
